subject: General Awareness
question_text: The rise in monthly SIP inflows to approximately ₹30,000 crore in 2025–26 indicates which of the following trends?

options.text: Growing retail investor participation via mutual funds

solution.final_answer: Growing retail investor participation via mutual funds

explanation.concept: SIP inflows reflect systematic retail investments into mutual funds.
step_by_step: Retail participation increases via mutual funds

why_correct.C: Higher SIP inflows show increased retail participation

why_incorrect.B: SIPs are long-term investments, not speculative
why_incorrect.D: SIP does not indicate institutional decline
